items.name: Tired Black Chbi Head
items.description:

Pure Black color eyes with black eyebags.
 Feel free to suggest recolors and such on our Roblox Group. (Creative Workspace)   
 https://www.roblox.com/groups/3682229/Creative-Workspace#!/about   Made to fit https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=17&CreatorName=Azaph3D&salesTypeFilter=1 but should probably work on any bundle since this one doesn't include a neck unlike my previous heads.
